label: chromium__admin-page-empty
description: KNOWN a11y debt (tracked, not accepted as correct) on the /admin user table. (1) aria_descendant_valid: CheckBoxDiv exposes role="checkbox" as a read-only state indicator nested inside the ConfirmationModal dialog-trigger <button>, so IBM flags the interactive-role descendant. The checkbox role is asserted by src/components/ui/__tests__/checkbox.a11y.test.tsx, so removing it needs a coordinated fix. (2) target_spacing_sufficient (WCAG 2.2 AAA): the row edit/delete action icons sit closer than 12 CSS px. Delete this file to resurface the violations in tests/a11y/admin-page.a11y.spec.ts.

results.message: The element with role "button" contains descendants with roles "checkbox" which are ignored by browsers
Undersized target "button" does not have sufficient spacing of 12 CSS pixels from another target "button"
Undersized target "button" does not have sufficient spacing of 12 CSS pixels from another target "button"
